candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.

Non-current and balancing line, not current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label.
Singular variant of the same concept used in some periods.
Common equivalent cash label on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, ending balance
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but target prefers balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, opening balance
candidates.why: Opening cash on cash flow statement, not the balance-sheet item.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences, cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a cash balance; just FX effect.
Unrelated to cash balance.

variables.notes: Priority list of equivalent balance-sheet cash labels used across periods.

candidates.why: This is the reported total current liabilities under IFRS-style wording.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current and balancing line, not current liabilities total.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist because it is the clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet label for current interest-bearing debt; excludes broad operating liabilities and is preferable when used.
Clear current portion of long-term debt; appears to be an alternative debt label across periods.
Can be financing-related current debt, but no values shown and likely only a component if present.

candidates.row_label: Net change, overdraft facilities and other financial liabilities
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock.

variables.notes: R:c. Priority list of alternative current-debt labels across periods. These should not be summed together when both exist in the same period, as they appear to represent the same underlying current debt concept. Lease-related rows were excluded.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax is non-current/non-payable in working-capital sense, so not TXP.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist because it clearly represents tax liabilities/payables.

candidates.why: Best reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Construction in progress and advance payments for tangible fixed assets, Gross
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related PPE component, not total PPE and not preferred baseline.
Balancing line, not reported PPE total.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - Other - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangibles and contra-account, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of PPE and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow line and intangible-related, not PPE stock.
Cash flow line and intangible-related, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total tangible assets line as the best PPE proxy.
